description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and exposed wooden beams, featuring a minimalist gray facade. The front of the house has large rectangular windows and a central door, flanked by a small manicured lawn and two palm trees. The rear of the house includes a private backyard with a hot tub and a low fence for privacy. The side views reveal the house's boxy structure and the continuation of the flat roof beams, as well as additional green space. The windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor areas, and a blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern, two-story gray house with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped front and back yards featuring palm trees and a hot tub.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, green lawn, and two palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof beams, side lawn, and the backyard area with a hot tub.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, hot tub, low fence, and additional windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the flat roof beams and the side green space.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with rectangular windows, small front lawn, and flanking palm trees
